# Pubky Documentation

> Pubky is an open protocol for key-based, censorship-resistant web applications. It provides identity via public keys, data storage on homeservers, and discovery via the Mainline DHT — all over simple HTTP/REST APIs.

## Quick Start

- [TL;DR](https://docs.pubky.org/tldr.md): 30-second overview of the Pubky decentralized web protocol
- [Getting Started](https://docs.pubky.org/getting-started.md): Complete guide for users and developers to start with Pubky
- [Overview](https://docs.pubky.org/overview.md): Welcome to the Pubky Knowledge Base
- [Glossary](https://docs.pubky.org/glossary.md): Quick reference for terms used throughout the Pubky ecosystem
- [FAQ](https://docs.pubky.org/faq.md): Frequently asked questions about Pubky Core
- [The Vision of Pubky](https://docs.pubky.org/the-vision-of-pubky.md): Decentralizing our future — the motivation behind Pubky
- [Architecture](https://docs.pubky.org/architecture.md): Comprehensive overview of the Pubky ecosystem architecture
- [Comparisons](https://docs.pubky.org/comparisons.md): How Pubky differs from other decentralized and federated protocols

## Key Concepts

- [Censorship](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/concepts/censorship.md): Why centralized platforms fail and how Pubky enables censorship resistance
- [Credible Exit](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/concepts/credible-exit.md): Ability to leave a platform without losing data, identity, or connections
- [Semantic Social Graph](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/concepts/semantic-social-graph.md): Tagged relationships and user-controlled filtering for personalized feeds

## Pubky Core

- [Introduction](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubkycore/introduction.md): Open protocol for per-public-key backends for censorship-resistant web applications
- [ELI5](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubkycore/eli5.md): Explaining Pubky Core like you're 5 years old
- [API Reference](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubkycore/api.md): RESTful HTTP API specification for storing and retrieving data on Homeservers
- [SDK](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubkycore/sdk.md): Client libraries for building applications on Pubky Core across multiple languages
- [Homeserver](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubkycore/homeserver.md): Independent data stores enabling censorship resistance and data portability
- [Authentication](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubkycore/authentication.md): Decentralized authentication where users control their own cryptographic keys
- [Security Model](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubkycore/security-model.md): Security model, threat landscape, and trust assumptions in Pubky Core

## PKARR

- [Introduction](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/introduction.md): Public-Key Addressable Resource Records for decentralized identity
- [Architecture](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/architecture.md): In-depth look at PKARR components, data formats, and interactions
- [Why PKARR?](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/why-pkarr.md): Motivation behind PKARR addressing distributed semantics, databases, and discovery
- [Getting Started](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/getting-started.md): Guide to publishing and resolving resource records using PKARR
- [Expectations](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/expectations.md): Understanding the expectations and limitations of PKARR
- [ELI5](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/eli5.md): Simple explanation of PKARR with Mainline DHT

## Pubky Apps

- [Introduction](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/introduction.md): Overview of the Pubky social application layer
- [ELI5](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/eli5.md): Simple explanation of Pubky App
- [App Specs](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/app-specs.md): Shared data model specifications for the Pubky social app ecosystem

## App Architectures

- [Introduction](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/app-architectures/introduction.md): Overview of application architecture patterns built on Pubky Core
- [Client-Homeserver](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/app-architectures/client-homeserver.md): Simple direct connection between client application and a single Homeserver
- [Global Aggregators](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/app-architectures/global-aggregators.md): Multiple Homeservers feeding data into a central aggregator service
- [Custom Backend](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/app-architectures/custom-backend.md): Advanced architecture with custom aggregation, inference, and specialized APIs

## Indexing and Aggregation

- [Introduction](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/introduction.md): Backend responsible for collecting and organizing data from Homeservers
- [Aggregator](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/aggregator.md): Specialized reducers that scan and collect data from Homeservers
- [Indexer](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/indexer.md): Normalizes and transforms aggregated data into a unified searchable view
- [Pubky Nexus](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/pubky-nexus.md): Production-grade indexing and aggregation service powering social features
- [Web Server](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/web-server.md): Backend services for data feeds, search, and UI configurations

## Reference App

- [Pubky Client](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/introduction.md): User-facing progressive web app for the Pubky social network
- [pubky.app](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/pubky-app.md): Web portal — a publisher and social feed for the decentralized web
- [Bookmarks](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/bookmarks.md): Privately save posts for later reference
- [Layouts](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/layouts.md): Multiple customizable UI layouts for column, grid, and list feeds
- [Notifications](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/notifications.md): Event tracking and activity alerts for user interactions
- [Perspectives](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/perspectives.md): Custom-filtered views with saved tags, weights, users, and layout settings
- [Posts](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/posts.md): Core content published by users on the platform
- [Profiles](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/profiles.md): User personal pages representing a public key identity
- [Search](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/search.md): Traditional search capabilities complementing tags and filters
- [Tags](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/tags.md): Free-text labels powering the Semantic Social Graph for discovery and filtering
- [Trends](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/trends.md): Statistical views and leaderboards of trending posts, tags, and users

## Technologies

- [Key Pairs](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/key-pair.md): Cryptographic key pairs for identity and signing in Pubky
- [Mainline DHT](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/mainline-dht.md): Distributed Hash Table used in BitTorrent with 10M+ nodes for decentralized discovery
- [DHT](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/dht.md): Decentralized key-value store for efficient distributed data retrieval
- [DNS](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/dns.md): Domain Name System translating human-readable names to IP addresses
- [DNS over HTTPS](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/doh.md): Security protocol encrypting DNS queries to prevent eavesdropping
- [HTTPS](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/https.md): HTTP extension encrypting communication using TLS
- [HTTP Relay](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/http-relay.md): Relay service for forwarding encrypted AuthTokens during authentication flows
- [PKDNS](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/pkdns.md): DNS server resolving PKARR public-key domains via Mainline DHT
- [Pubky Ring](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/pubky-ring.md): Mobile identity manager for key management and app authorization
- [Homegate](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/homegate.md): Homeserver signup gatekeeping via SMS and Lightning payment verification
- [Pubky CLI](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/pubky-cli.md): Command-line tool for interacting with Pubky Homeservers
- [Pubky Docker](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/pubky-docker.md): Docker Compose orchestration for a full local Pubky development environment
- [Pubky Explorer](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/pubky-explorer.md): Web-based file browser for exploring public data on Homeservers
- [Pubky Backup](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/pubky-backup.md): Desktop backup application for maintaining local copies of published data
- [Pubky Moderation](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/pubky-moderation.md): Content moderation service protecting homeserver operators and users
- [Pubky Noise](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/pubky-noise.md): Encrypted communication protocol (work in progress)
- [Paykit](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/paykit.md): Decentralized payment protocol (work in progress)
- [Jeb](https://docs.pubky.org/explore/technologies/jeb-pubky-ai-bot.md): AI-powered bot for intelligent summaries and fact-checking on Pubky

## Community

- [Contributing](https://docs.pubky.org/contributing.md): Guide to contributing to Pubky
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.pubky.org/troubleshooting.md): Common issues and solutions when working with Pubky
